name: Foraging
description: Allows you to gather wild food from the environment. Higher ranks improve yield and rarity.

ranks.description: Gather basic wild berries, mushrooms, and roots.
Find rarer herbs and higher quality forage.
Master forager. Double yield from all foraging.

name: Mining
description: Extract ores from rock nodes. Higher ranks unlock rarer ores.

ranks.description: Mine iron ore and coal.
Mine copper and silver ore.
Mine mithril and magical ores.

name: Cooking
description: Craft food items from raw ingredients at a cooking fire.

ranks.description: Cook basic bread and soups.
Cook stews, pies, and cured meats.
Master cook. Create meals with bonus stat effects.

name: Sewing
description: Craft cloth armors, cloaks, robes, and accessories.

ranks.description: Craft basic gloves and boots.
Craft cloaks and scholar hats.
Craft enchanted robes and silk garments.

name: Gardening
description: Grow crops and herbs in designated garden beds.

ranks.description: Grow basic vegetables like carrots.
Grow wheat and medicinal herbs.
Grow rare magical plants with powerful effects.

name: Forging Weapons
description: Craft weapons at a forge using ingots.

ranks.description: Forge iron weapons: swords, axes, maces.
Forge steel and silver weapons.
Forge mithril weapons of legendary quality.

name: Forging Armor
description: Craft armor sets at a forge using ingots.

ranks.description: Forge iron armor, helms, and shields.
Forge steel armor and reinforced shields.
Forge mithril armor of unmatched protection.

name: Bash
description: A powerful melee strike that may stun the target. Available to Fighter Guild members.

ranks.description: Strike with full force. 30% chance to stun enemy for 1 round.

name: Guild Forging
description: Fighter Guild members can forge superior quality weapons and armor, exceeding normal forging limits.

ranks.description: Forge guild-quality weapons and armor with bonus stats.

name: Master's Second Strike
description: Fighter Guild masters may strike twice per combat turn.

ranks.description: Attack twice each turn. The second attack costs 50% AP.

name: Use Magic Items
description: Thieves learn to use potions, scrolls, and wands created by mages, clerics, and druids.

ranks.description: Use any potion, scroll, or wand regardless of source.

name: Steal
description: Pick the pockets of unsuspecting NPCs for gold and items.

ranks.description: Attempt to pickpocket nearby NPCs. Failure alerts the target.

name: Backstab
description: Strike an enemy before combat begins. If enough damage is dealt, the enemy dies instantly and drops loot.

ranks.description: Deal player max HP as damage before combat. Instant kill on success grants loot without combat.

name: Scribe Scrolls
description: Mages may write magical scrolls at a writing desk.

ranks.description: Scribe scrolls for any mage spell you know.

name: Scribe Holy Scrolls
description: Clerics may write holy scrolls at a writing desk.

ranks.description: Scribe scrolls for any cleric spell you know.

name: Scribe Nature Scrolls
description: Druids may write nature scrolls at a writing desk.

ranks.description: Scribe scrolls for any druid spell you know.

name: Brew Potions
description: Mages can craft potions using a heavy cauldron.

ranks.description: Brew mana potions, strength brews, and arcane tonics.

name: Brew Holy Potions
description: Clerics can craft healing and protective potions.

ranks.description: Brew health potions, antidotes, and blessed tonics.

name: Brew Nature Potions
description: Druids can craft nature-based potions at a cauldron.

ranks.description: Brew regeneration brews, nature tonics, and druid draughts.

name: Craft Wands and Staffs
description: Master mages can craft wands and staffs imbued with their spells.

ranks.description: Craft any mage wand or staff using a crafting station.

name: Craft Holy Wands and Staffs
description: Master clerics can craft wands and staffs of holy power.

ranks.description: Craft any cleric wand or staff using a crafting station.

name: Craft Nature Wands and Staffs
description: Master druids can craft nature wands and staffs.

ranks.description: Craft any druid wand or staff using a crafting station.
